issue: The mobile sidebar toggle button is not visible on screens smaller than 768px in the student dashboard.

timeline.detail: Selecting candidate files based on issue keywords.
Selected 8 file(s): admin/admin-theme.css, admin/boxicons.min.css, admin/includes/header.php, admin/includes/navbar.php, admin/local-icons.css, admin/logs/log.css ...
Reading bounded snippets from candidate files.

result.summary: Mobile sidebar toggle button missing on small screens
result.explanation: The mobile sidebar toggle button in header.php uses the 'mobile-menu-btn' class but lacks corresponding CSS styling. The button's visibility depends on proper styling which is missing, causing it to appear invisible on screens <768px. The existing .btn class in admin-theme.css is not applied to this element, leading to no background, color, or visibility.
result.root_cause: Missing CSS styling for the 'mobile-menu-btn' class in admin-theme.css, resulting in an unstyled button that blends into the background
checks: Verify button visibility after applying styles
Ensure icon font is loaded correctly
tradeoffs: Requires adding new CSS rules, but maintains design consistency
result.patch_preview: Add .mobile-menu-btn { background: var(--primary); color: var(--white); padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
notes: Ensure the button's icon (material-symbols-outlined) is properly loaded via the icon font check script
Consider adding hover effects for better UX

raw:
{
  "summary": "Mobile sidebar toggle button missing on small screens",
  "explanation": "The mobile sidebar toggle button in header.php uses the 'mobile-menu-btn' class but lacks corresponding CSS styling. The button's visibility depends on proper styling which is missing, causing it to appear invisible on screens <768px. The existing .btn class in admin-theme.css is not applied to this element, leading to no background, color, or visibility.",
  "root_cause": "Missing CSS styling for the 'mobile-menu-btn' class in admin-theme.css, resulting in an unstyled button that blends into the background",
  "fix_options": ["Add .mobile-menu-btn styling to admin-theme.css"],
  "tradeoffs": ["Requires adding new CSS rules, but maintains design consistency"],
  "risk": "low",
  "checks": ["Verify button visibility after applying styles", "Ensure icon font is loaded correctly"],
  "patch_preview": "Add .mobile-menu-btn { background: var(--primary); color: var(--white); padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); }",
  "target_file": "admin/admin-theme.css",
  "improved_code": ".mobile-menu-btn {\n  background: var(--primary);\n  color: var(--white);\n  padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\n  border-radius: var(--border-radius);\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n}",
  "notes": ["Ensure the button's icon (material-symbols-outlined) is properly loaded via the icon font check script", "Consider adding hover effects for better UX"]
}
